Since the beginning

The Surya Story

Nestled under the Nerul Bridge in North Goa, Surya Bar & Restaurant has been a beloved gathering place for years. Named after the sun — Surya — we believe every meal should feel like warmth: generous, golden, and full of life. From the catch of the morning tide to the cold beer at sundown, every plate carries the honest flavours of Goa. This is not just a restaurant. This is where Nerul comes to eat, drink, and belong.

Our signature

The Surya Fish Thali

The crown jewel of our kitchen. Fresh catch, Goan curry, and all the love that goes into a real thali.

Chef's picks

Surya Specials

From sizzling seafood platters to comfort dishes that keep regulars coming back.

Raise a glass

Surya Drinks

Ice-cold Kings, classic cocktails, and everything in between. Because every good meal deserves a great drink.

Good to know

Frequently Asked Questions

We are located under the Nerul Bridge, Nerul, North Goa — 403114. Look for us right by the water. You can also find us on Google Maps.
We are open Monday to Wednesday and Friday to Sunday. Lunch is served from 12:00 PM to 3:30 PM, and dinner from 7:00 PM to midnight. We are closed every Thursday.
The Surya Fish Thali is our signature dish — a complete Goan meal with rice, fish curry, fresh fish cutlet or Tisryo, Bhaji, Goan salad, Solkadi, papad, and pickle. Available with Chonak (₹295), Prawn (₹275), or Bangdo (₹175). Locally sourced, fresh every day.
Yes! You can book a table by calling us at +91 90111 38515 or messaging us on WhatsApp. We recommend booking in advance on weekends and for large groups.
Yes, we have a Veg Thali (₹195), Pakoda Gobi, Paneer dishes, Xacuti Mushroom, vegetarian sides, and more. Our menu has something for everyone.
Yes, we do takeaway and parcel orders. A small charge of ₹20 per item applies for parcel packaging. Call or WhatsApp us to place your order.
